name: The Stanford Inn by the Sea
description: America's premier vegan resort, nestled on a hillside overlooking Mendocino Bay. Features the renowned Ravens Restaurant with organic plant-based cuisine sourced from their own gardens. Offers yoga, kayaking, mountain biking, and a heated indoor pool with ocean views.
address: 44850 Comptche Ukiah Rd, Mendocino, CA 95460, USA

name: Beck Hall
description: England's first 100% plant-based hotel, built in 1705 as a yeoman's cottage in the stunning Yorkshire Dales village of Malham. Features 20 unique, characterful rooms with cruelty-free bedding and toiletries. Seasonal plant-based dining using locally sourced ingredients.
address: Cove Rd, Malham, Skipton BD23 4DJ, United Kingdom

name: Villa Vegana
description: One of Europe's first fully vegan hotels, opened in 2013 in Mallorca. Set within a designated conservation area on 30,000 sqm of grounds with panoramic views of the Tramuntana Mountains. Offers gourmet vegan cuisine, yoga, and nature walks.
address: Cami d'es Pedregar, Km 2.2, 07313 Selva, Mallorca, Spain

name: LA VIMEA Vegan Hotel
description: Italy's first entirely plant-based hotel, an adults-only retreat in the charming village of Naturno in South Tyrol. Features wellness facilities with saunas, a natural swimming pond, indoor pool, yoga programs, and creative vegan cuisine using regional and seasonal ingredients.
address: Naturno, South Tyrol, 39025, Italy

name: Koukoumi Vegan Boutique Hotel
description: Greece's first 5-star vegan hotel, set in the peaceful village of Ano Mera on Mykonos. Features 14 minimalist rooms inspired by Cycladic architecture, a magnesium pool, vegan spa, yoga studio, and artful vegan cuisine.
address: Ano Mera, Mykonos 846 00, Greece

name: Vegan Agrivilla i pini
description: A plant-based agriturismo near San Gimignano in Tuscany's rolling hills. Features 11 elegant lodgings surrounded by vineyards, olive groves, and regenerative permaculture gardens. Serves creative vegan cuisine from their own organic produce.
address: Loc. Santa Margherita 37, 53037 San Gimignano, Tuscany, Italy

name: Casa Albets
description: Spain's first organic and vegan hotel, an 11th-century manor house lovingly restored in rural Catalonia. Features a Michelin Bib Gourmand vegan restaurant with a 7-course menu that changes for every meal, using vegetables from their own garden.
address: Casa Albets s/n, 25283 Lladurs, Lleida, Catalunya, Spain

name: Kapuhala Koh Samui
description: An iconic vegan eco resort in the hills of Chaweng Noi, Koh Samui. Features 5 tented villas and 4 detached seaview farmhouses, a plant-based restaurant, fitness studio, and a 25-meter infinity pool with sweeping sea views. Fully plant-based amenities throughout.
address: 104/86 Moo 3, Bophut, Koh Samui, Thailand

name: Mother Earth Vegan Hotel
description: The first vegan, plant-based hotel in Costa Rica, located minutes from Tamarindo beach. Features spacious rooms, modern interiors, a saltwater natural pool, al-fresco vegan restaurant, and a yoga studio.
address: Calle Verano 50309, Tamarindo, Guanacaste, Costa Rica

name: Casa Mauna Boutique Hotel
description: The first vegan hotel in Latin America with an ocean view, nestled on Oaxaca's serene Salchi coast. Features six deluxe suites with stunning ocean views and a plant-based restaurant serving locally inspired cuisine and excellent drinks.
address: Salchi, San Pedro Pochutla, Oaxaca, Mexico

name: Volcano Eco Retreat by Heart Core Hotels
description: Hawaii's first 100% vegan hotel, set on 4 acres of secluded native Hawaiian ohia tree forest near Hawai'i Volcanoes National Park. Strong focus on sustainability and social impact, with everything from breakfast to amenities carefully sourced for sustainable luxury.
address: 11-2888 Hibiscus St, Mountain View, HI 96771, USA

name: The Yucca by Heart Core Hotels
description: Southern California's first vegan hotel in Desert Hot Springs, blending contemporary California and mid-century design with sustainable luxury. Features vegan bed linens and bath amenities, daily plant-based gourmet breakfast, saltwater mineral pool and spa.
address: 6635 Desert View Ave, Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240, USA

name: Black Sheep Inn and Spa
description: A 100% vegan inn in a historic 19th century Octagon House set within 3 acres in the Finger Lakes region. Offers delicious home-cooked vegan food, spa services, and proximity to renowned wine country. All food, amenities, and spa products are fully vegan.
address: 8329 Pleasant Valley Road, Hammondsport, NY 14840, USA

name: Pebble Cove Farm
description: A fully vegan, organic waterfront farm inn and animal sanctuary on Orcas Island, Washington. Features stunning views, beach access, acres of gardens and orchards, rescue animals, and organic continental vegan breakfast. All food and toiletries are cruelty-free.
address: 3341 Deer Harbor Rd, Orcas Island, WA 98245, USA

name: La Crisalida Retreats
description: A fully plant-based health and wellbeing retreat on Spain's sunny Costa Blanca. All food is vegan, packed with vitamins and minerals. Offers yoga, fitness, detox programs, juicing, and holistic wellness in a seaside setting near Alicante.
address: Avenida de Sant Marc 9, 03581 Playa del Albir, Alicante, Spain

name: Amalurra Ecohotel & Retreat Center
description: An organic eco-hotel with spa in the Basque Country, 30 minutes from Bilbao. Features 19 rooms and 2 apartments surrounded by wild vegetation, forests, and gardens. Restaurant serves vegetarian and vegan cuisine with a focus on sustainability.
address: Finca La Reneja 35, 48879 Artzentales, Basque Country, Spain

name: Olive Retreat
description: A vegan wellness retreat in the mountains of Alicante/Valencia, Spain, with serene sunrises over the valley to the Mediterranean. Features yoga, meditation, amazing vegan food from a head chef using organic locally-sourced ingredients, and solar-powered sustainability.
address: Alicante/Valencia region, Spain

name: Vegan Minshuku Sanbiki Neko
description: A charming fully vegan bed & breakfast in Kyoto's Higashiyama district, offering traditional Japanese-style rooms with en-suite bathrooms and a delicious vegan cooked breakfast. Close to Kiyomizu-dera, Fushimi Inari, and the Gion area.
address: 90 Imagumano Minamihiyoshichou, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto-shi, Kyoto, Japan

name: Vegan BellaVista Hostel
description: A vegan hostel in central Taksim, Istanbul, featuring a rooftop terrace with stunning vistas of the city. Offers vegan cafe and restaurant on-site, with shopping, dining, and entertainment just steps away.
address: Bulbul Mahallesi Turan Caddesi 50, Beyoglu, 34435, Istanbul, Turkey

name: Fivelements Retreat Bali
description: An award-winning eco-conscious wellness retreat tucked along the sacred Ayung River near Ubud. Features plant-based Sakti Dining Room with inspired vegan cuisine, holistic healing therapies, yoga, and traditional Balinese wellness rituals in a serene riverside setting.
address: Puri Ahimsa, Banjar Baturning, Mambal, Bali 80352, Indonesia

name: Gdas Bali Health and Wellness Resort
description: A holistic wellness resort in Ubud featuring healing programs, fully plant-based dining at Tangi restaurant, and peaceful eco-luxury villas overlooking rice paddies. Includes spa, plunge pools, saunas, yoga studios, and modern therapies like cryotherapy.
address: Jalan Cempaka, Banjar Kumbuh, Mas, Ubud, 80571, Indonesia

name: Harmony Hill Bali
description: A 100% vegan boutique villa retreat in Tampaksiring, perched upon a ridge overlooking a gorgeous valley and luscious rice fields. Luxurious villas in a traditional village setting, about 30 minutes from central Ubud.
address: Jl. Manik Tawang, Tampaksiring, 80552, Bali, Indonesia

name: BeingSattvaa Retreat
description: An integrated wellness retreat in the forested hills of Ubud, featuring ten Balinese garden villas. Serves a fine selection of vegetarian and vegan food from around the world. Surrounded by rainforest, paddy fields, and flowing water, 15 minutes from central Ubud.
address: Jalan Raya Kendran, Banjar Kepitu, Desa Kendran, Ubud, Bali 80561, Indonesia

name: Soulshine Bali
description: A barefoot luxury resort, retreat center, organic farm, restaurant, and music venue in Ubud. Features entirely organic vegan-friendly menu, total body nourishment through farm-to-table dining, yoga, and holistic wellness programs.
address: Jalan Ambarwati, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali, Indonesia

name: Atsumi Retreat Healing Center
description: Phuket's original detox and healing centre since 2003, set within lush tropical gardens. Specializes in fasting, detox, yoga, meditation, and spa treatments including reiki, sound healing, and acupuncture. Plant-based vegan food served at Orion Cafe.
address: 34/18 Soi King Pattana, Rawai, Phuket, Thailand

name: Orion Healing Centre
description: A holistic healing, detox and yoga retreat on Koh Phangan island. Offers plant-based vegan food, holistic treatments including reiki, sound healing, and acupuncture. Programs range from weekend detox to month-long renewals.
address: 15/2 Moo 8, Sri Thanu, Koh Phangan, Suratthani 84280, Thailand

name: Veda5 Ayurveda & Yoga Retreat
description: A highly-rated ayurvedic wellness retreat in the Himalayan foothills near Rishikesh. Features 22 rooms, meditation cave, yoga pavilions, and a world-class Ayurveda center. All food is pure vegetarian satvik cuisine with excellent vegan dining options.
address: Ratta Pani, Neelkanth Road, Near Phool Chatti Ashram, 249201, Rishikesh, India

name: Peace of Eden Vegan Nature Lodge
description: Africa's first vegan backpackers lodge and retreat, on the edge of the Knysna Forest in the heart of South Africa's Garden Route. An eco-friendly lodge offering quirky, beautiful accommodations surrounded by indigenous forest.
address: Rheenendal Road, 6576 Rheenendal, Knysna, South Africa

name: Sardinia Eco Vegan House
description: An eco-friendly vegan B&B in the tranquil town of Zeddiani, Sardinia. Features a patio with orange trees, classic-style accommodation, and vegan meals made from locally sourced ingredients. Uses renewable energy and environmentally friendly practices.
address: Piazza Chiesa 15, 09070 Zeddiani OR, Sardinia, Italy

name: Palmaïa - The House of AïA
description: The world's first plant-based all-inclusive resort, on Playa del Carmen's Riviera Maya. All suites feature non-leather furniture and feather-free bedding. Six restaurants serve over 300 vibrant plant-based dishes prepared by Michelin-trained chefs.
address: Paseo Xaman-Ha, Playacar, 77710 Playa del Carmen, Quintana Roo, Mexico

name: Hotel Holistika Tulum
description: A jungle wellness retreat in Tulum featuring 24 rooms nestled amidst nature, 2 pools, daily yoga classes, immersive events, and soulful ceremonies. The on-site Tierra restaurant serves only vegan and vegetarian dishes.
address: Av. 10 Sur Lote 4, Zona 11, Manzana 902, Tulum 77780, Mexico

name: Playa Viva
description: A 2 Michelin Key, B-Corp Certified sustainable boutique eco-resort on Mexico's Pacific coast. Situated on a mile of pristine beach between the Pacific Ocean and Sierra Madre Mountains. Farm-to-table cuisine with excellent vegan options from their own organic gardens.
address: Carretera Zihuatanejo-Acapulco, Playa Icacos 40834, Juluchuca, Guerrero, Mexico

name: The Retreat Costa Rica
description: An intimate 25-room luxury hotel perched atop a rare crystal-quartz mountain overlooking the rainforest and Pacific Ocean. Cuisine is entirely dairy, gluten, and refined-sugar free with extensive vegan options. Features wellness programs and spa.
address: 50 E Redondel De Toros, Atenas, Alajuela, Costa Rica

name: Willka T'ika Wellness Retreat
description: A luxury wellness retreat and boutique hotel in Peru's Sacred Valley between Cusco and Machu Picchu. Founded in 1995, features the renowned Chakra Gardens with exotic and medicinal plants. The only 100% hormone-free and chemical-free gourmet vegetarian hotel kitchen in the Sacred Valley.
address: Urubamba, Sacred Valley, Cusco Region, Peru

name: Mana Retreat Centre
description: A vegetarian and vegan-friendly retreat centre on New Zealand's Coromandel Peninsula. Offers a range of retreat programs, workshops, and events. Caters for vegan, dairy-free and gluten-free diets with lacto-ovo vegetarian buffets and vegan options on request.
address: 608 Manaia Road, Coromandel 3581, New Zealand

name: Art of Living Retreat Center
description: A mountain-top wellness retreat set amidst 380 acres of pristine forest in the Blue Ridge Mountains. Offers yoga, meditation, Ayurveda, and holistic wellness programs. The Purna Dining Hall serves daily vegetarian buffets with extensive vegan options.
address: 639 Whispering Hills Rd, Boone, NC 28607, USA

name: Sophie's Hostel Prague
description: A boutique hostel in the heart of Prague, within walking distance of the Czech National Museum and Wenceslas Square. Offers vegan and vegetarian breakfast options alongside standard fare. Stylish, comfortable rooms in a central location.
address: Melounova 2, Praha 2, 120 00, Czech Republic

name: Phranakorn-Nornlen Hotel
description: A vegan-friendly boutique hotel in Bangkok's traditional Phranakorn district, near the Grand Palace and Khaosan Road. 31 rooms with an artsy retro vibe and emphasis on healthy living. Budget-friendly with a focus on plant-based dining.
address: 46 Thewet Soi 1, Phranakorn, Bangkhunprom, Krungkasem, Bangkok, Thailand

name: Olive Wood Vegan BnB
description: A fully vegan B&B set on 3 acres near Byron Bay, Australia. Run by a qualified chef and cookbook author, featuring freshly prepared vegan meals. A tranquil retreat in the lush hinterland of New South Wales.
address: 89 Willowbank Drive, Alstonvale, NSW 2477, Australia

name: Saorsa 1875
description: The UK's first fully vegan hotel, located in the heart of Highland Perthshire, Scotland. Combines Victorian charm with seasonal plant-based cuisine and cruelty-free amenities in the picturesque town of Pitlochry. Note: check current operating status before booking.
address: 2 East Moulin Road, Pitlochry, Perthshire PH16 5DW, United Kingdom
